td.div:
This is the editor used to design the content and the look and feel of your SMS message.
An SMS has 2 parts:
Message (Body):
Click here to learn more about the SMS EDITOR.
Signature:
The signature ("from") for the SMS.
PREVIEW MODE
After creating the structure and content of the SMS, you can switch to PREVIEW MODE by clicking the link at the top. The PREVIEW MODE will display the SMS as the receipient would see it. It will also let you preview with the real data embedded.
Click here to learn more about the SMS EDITOR.
